dominators: Is it guaranteed that whenever line 2:  <statement> int main (int argc, char *argv[]) </statement> is reached, the statement line 6:  <statement> char x = e[*p - 97] - 32; </statement> has already been reached?

data_dependency: Does variable p at line 5: <statement>     for (char *p = argv[1]; *p; p++) { </statement> determine the value stored in variable x at line 6: <statement>         char x = e[*p - 97] - 32; </statement>?

Does the value of variable i at line 9: <statement>         while (i--) </statement> depend on the value of variable e at line 4: <statement>     char e[] = "&75+#=)?'8*;$%(92-/\".>,643"; </statement>?
